steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
Apply the distributive property to each side of the equation:

$$12(x-3) = -3(x+12)$$
$$12x - 36 = -3x - 36$$

steps.title: Rearrange and solve for x
steps.content:
Add $3x$ to both sides and add \$36$ to both sides:

$$12x + 3x = -36 + 36$$
$$15x = 0$$
$$x = 0$$

Since we obtained exactly one value for $x$, there is exactly one solution. That matches choice A — A is correct.
